name: MCDMapECUParamToSysVariableWrite
title: MCDMapECUParamToSysVariableWrite
syntax: long MCDMapECUParamToSysVariableWrite(char moduleName[], char parameterName[], SysVarName)
description: Maps an ECU parameter to a system variable so that it is changed whenever the system variable changes.

parameters.name: moduleName
parameters.description: Name of the module that is configured in the global options dialog External Programs|MCD 3D Server.
